aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are likely to cite Omar & Sons Air Duct Cleaners due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed to maximize visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate information, but more posts and Q&A engagement could enhance visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of regular posts to engage audience.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining duct cleaning process
